title: juncus triformis var. stylosus
intro: Juncus triformis var. stylosus is a type of plant commonly known as three-angled rush, a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the Juncaceae family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Juncus triformis var. stylosus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, or used in herbal preparations such as salves, creams, and tinctures to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
